title: gutierrezia conoidea
intro: Gutierrezia conoidea, also known as a shrubby or bushy form of Broomweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia conoidea include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Gutierrezia conoidea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
